content.query:
USE electric_vehicle_explorer


SELECT 
MIN(electricRange) AS minElectricRange,
MAX(electricRange) AS maxElectricRang,
AVG(electricRange) AS avgElectricRange,
COUNT(1) AS total_numbre_of_electric_range,
COUNT(electricRange) AS not_null_total_numbre_of_electric_range
FROM
OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'abfss://electric-vehicle-data@asynapseadls.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/vehicle.csv', 
        FORMAT = 'CSV', 
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0', 
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
        ) WITH (
            vehicleID           INT,
            vin                 VARCHAR(10),
            modelYEar           SMALLINT,
            make                VARCHAR(25), 
            model               VARCHAR(25),
            electricRange       SMALLINT,
            baseMSRP           INT,
            vehicheTypeId       SMALLINT,
            cafvEligibilityId   SMALLINT,
            vehicleLocation     VARCHAR(30)
            )
        AS [result]
        WHERE electricRange > 0 AND make='Tesla'
